nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: Double-eyed fig parrot
nodes.summary: Double-eyed fig parrot（Double-eyed fig parrot，学名 Cyclopsitta diophthalma），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: macleayana, Queensland, Australia | genus = Cyclopsitta | species = diophthalma | authority = (Hombron & Jacquinot, 1841) }} The double-eyed fig parrot (Cyclopsitta diophthalma), also known as the blue-faced fig parrot, red-faced fig parrot, dwarf fig parrot, and the two-eyed fig parrot, primarily inhabits forests on New Guinea and nearby islands, but is also found in isolated communities along the tropical Australian coast, east of the Great Dividing Range
